raw_input.title: Solutions Architect
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Solutions Architect for GitLab DevSecOps platform. Customer-facing technical discovery, demos, presales-style solutioning, DevSecOps, security/compliance risk, digital transformation, and enterprise stakeholders.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with product delivery and possible presales/SE pivot, but not a direct Solutions Architect background.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: good pivot candidate, but it needs a tailored narrative rather than direct APPLY_NOW.
